text.message: I'll take 4 2 9 if you trade me your starting wood
Would get you on a better spot than you get now imo
3 4 11 was not in my inteest lol
You literally have better chances robbing the other guy lol
he is happy with a wood or wheat
66 for better cause u had wheat 2
i ll give you for an ore
You robbed it from me last turn
Are you looking to plough me red?
But why bro you have other good spots on the board
I literally commited a road towards the spot before you oj
How did you not see it coming lol
I didn't know if you were going to 45 or 63 and that's my only spot to build to
Lol, it's not. And the 4 5 is obviously better
Was ciritcal that I got that spot
Where else do I build from 835
You just picked a fight for no reason
Jesus dude. Didn't realise you were entitled to the entire board
I said you picked a fight, never said I was entitled
How did you not equally pick a fight when commiting towards the spot after me?
I can build to from that settlement
The spot is really good for me, obviously. Plus it balances the board way better if I get it. Big mistake by blue to not give it imo
You have loads of other spots lol. Bro what are you talking about
but i guess thats best for me now
Let's finish up quickly my dudes
Stop trading with him bro he's leading by miles
You used up one for your settle
Mmm glad we didn't let me have army lol
Much better that oj has it
black wins with a road here
I have nothing to play for blue
but still hes not in his senses
